---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# arkhaia: Archaeological and Historical Analysis

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

This package contains a suite of tools developed for the analysis of archaeological and historical data.

Current functions center on:

* Least squares spectral analysis via lowest frequency iteration (LSSA-LFI).
* Measuring effect size (bias-corrected Cramér's $V$) between archaeological assemblages.

## Installation

To obtain the current development version of arkhaia from GitHub, install from GitHub in the R command line with:

``` r
library(devtools)
install_github("scollinselliott/arkaia", dependencies = TRUE) 
```
